enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps a busy day in Boulder: visiting his mom's house to do chores and plant flowers, a frustrating multi-stop errand run to find earphones for swimming that ended with an online order from a sketchy site, and a confusing motorcycle rack/tool bag installation involving a screw mix-up that turned out fine. He attributes the loopiness to being tired and stoned.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: gets loopy and forgetful but eventually figures things out
suspicious of sites that ask for email passwords, worried about getting scammed
uses a hash pen but says he doesn't smoke before or during work

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday I worked all day long.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went into work, did two houses, and then went by my mom's house on my way home.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I stop by my mom's house a lot.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I did the dishes at my mom's house.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We needed a bunch of plants to plant a bunch of flowers.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was at my mom's house for a couple of hours because she always has stuff for me to do.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went home and planned to do some errands.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to R.E.I. and Sports Authority to find little earphones but they didn't have them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I ended up ordering the earphones online from a weird site that asked for my email password.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I freaked out because the site had no account login or customer service number.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I thought I got robbed because the site seemed sketchy.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The people who sell swimming materials don't know about the professionals who sell motorcycle stuff.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wanted to install a mail rack and a front bag on my motorcycle.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I needed longer screws to install the tool bag on top of the rack.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to the hardware store to get longer screws but they were too long.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I found the original screws were the right size after all.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I realized I needed the longer screws for the tool bag on top of the rack.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was high and tired, which made me loopy and forgetful.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I don't smoke hash in the morning or when I work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't upload my video because I hit sleep on my computer before it finished uploading.
